findings.problem: The chapter frames felony-level risk, but its major consequences are mostly deferred to tomorrow language; the on-page arc resolves as a competent extraction rather than a costly turn, which softens causal impact.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the leverage sequence and exit aftermath at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:233, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:253, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:311, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:427, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:437 so one irreversible consequence from tonight is already active before chapter end (not only forecasted risk).
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised text in the confrontation/exfiltration and final pages shows one already-triggered consequence that forces an immediate plan change on-page before dawn; FAIL if the chapter still ends with only predictions about what may happen next morning.

findings.problem: Sanitization via moral safety valve: after exposing Deputy Waller's role, the narration quickly recenters Lena in a clean ethical credo, reducing the unresolved contamination the chapter just uncovered.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the closing emotional turn at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:421, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:423, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:427, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:439 so the chapter stays inside conflicted consequence (specific incriminating memory/evidence friction) instead of concluding with reassurance.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised final section keeps Lena morally unsettled and materially exposed, with no self-exonerating thesis line; FAIL if the ending still resolves into a declarative reassurance about her ethical clarity.

findings.problem: Register separation blurs in high-pressure exchanges: Mara (high-contraction profile) repeatedly shifts into formal uncontracted/legal phrasing, and Lena/Mara often share the same polished syntax, reducing idiolect contrast.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the Calvin confrontation and car debrief at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:221, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:245, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:331, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:369 so Mara sounds faster and more colloquial under pressure while Lena toggles from procedural setup to hard, compact bursts.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, in the revised confrontation passage, Mara uses contractions in at least 3 of 5 spoken lines and Lena's adjacent lines are recognizably distinct in rhythm/diction when speaker tags are removed; FAIL if both voices still read as interchangeable formal brief-writing.

findings.problem: Recurring prose tic: the exact reaction formula 'Mara nodded once' appears three times, flattening beats that should carry different subtext.
findings.rewrite_direction: Replace or vary the repeated construction at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:53, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:177, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:385 with distinct physical/verbal reactions tied to each moment's leverage shift.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if those three beats no longer reuse the same formula and each revised beat communicates a different intent (agreement, concession, or tactical pivot) by context; FAIL if the exact repeated construction remains three times.

summary: Chapter 7 hits required plot beats and shows no clear continuity or tense contradiction, but it remains below pass level: consequence is deferred, the ending self-stabilizes after a major moral reveal, dialogue idiolects blur under pressure, and repeated reaction phrasing signals prose autopilot.
